dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Sam, can you help me tomorrow night? It's Mum's birthday and I want to do something special.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Of course! What are you planning?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: I want to cook dinner for her at home. She loves fresh vegetables, so I'll make her favorite dish.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: That's a lovely idea. Do you need me to buy anything?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Yes, please. Can you get some fresh vegetables from the market? I'll need them by six o'clock tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: No problem. Will you show us the recipe later?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Sure! I'll send it to your phone this evening. Oh, and one more thing - can you ring the doorbell when you arrive? Don't just walk in. I want to keep it a surprise.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Got it. This will be great!

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Alex, it's me! I'm here with the vegetables.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Perfect timing! Come into the kitchen. Cut the vegetables please, while I work on the cake.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Okay. Should I cut them carefully or just quickly?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Carefully, please. We want them to look nice. Mum will be home in two hours.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Ouch! Oh no!

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: What happened? Are you okay?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I cut my hand. It's bleeding badly.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Let me see. That's deep. We need to call the doctor. Here, push this cloth on it.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Do you think I need to go to the hospital?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: I don't know. Let me phone them and ask. Keep pressure on the wound.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: The hospital said you should come in. They want to check the wound.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: But what about the dinner? Your mum will be home soon.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Don't worry about that. Your hand is more important. I'll call Mum and tell her the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I'm so sorry, Alex. I ruined everything.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: You didn't ruin anything. It was an accident. Come on, I'll drive you to the hospital now.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Thank you. You're a good friend.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Later that night, Mum phoned the hospital to check on you. She said we can all go to a restaurant tomorrow instead.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Really? Will you accept my apology?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: There's nothing to accept! I'm just glad you're okay. The doctor said your hand will be fine in a week.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Next time, I'll be more careful. I promise.
